parameters.toolDescription: Run a follow-up SQL query against the vault database (vault.duckdb) ONLY. Use this to explore mart results returned by ask_inventory_question. NEVER query source.duckdb directly — always use ask_inventory_question for source data questions.

values.name: sql
values.description: The SQL query to execute against vault.duckdb. Use unqualified names (e.g. hub_product, mart_product_count).

parameters.name: describe_schema
parameters.description: List all tables in the vault database (vault.duckdb). Shows hub, link, satellite, and mart tables. For source database questions, use ask_inventory_question instead.

parameters.toolDescription: ALWAYS use this tool first for ANY question about inventory data, source databases, or the data pipeline. The Dispatcher agent handles everything: answering business questions, querying source metadata, building vault tables, and returning results. Only use run_query or describe_schema for follow-up exploration of results already returned by this tool.

values.name: question
values.description: A natural language inventory question, e.g. Which products are below safety stock? or Show me purchase orders by vendor.
